# Poulin Cooling A/C and Refrigeration

> Licensed HVAC contractor in Clearwater, FL. AC repair, heating repair, refrigeration, indoor air quality, and maintenance for residential and commercial properties. Same-day and emergency service available.

## Contact

- Address: 1237 South Lincoln Avenue, Ste B, Clearwater, FL 33756
- Phone: (727) 424-2222
- Website: https://poulincooling.com
- Hours: Mon–Fri 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM

## Services

- Air Conditioning Repair, Installation, Maintenance
- Heating Repair, Installation, Maintenance
- Commercial Refrigeration Repair
- Indoor Air Quality Services
- Residential and Commercial AC Services

## Service Areas

Clearwater, St. Petersburg, Palm Harbor, Dunedin, Largo, Safety Harbor, Tarpon Springs, Oldsmar, Seminole, Pinellas Park, Trinity, East Lake, Westchase, Belleair, Indian Rocks Beach, Treasure Island, Madeira Beach
